duplicateDetection.analysis: FIND-S4-SPEC-001..011 are block-shape contract conflicts unique to Sprint 4 scope; no overlap with Sprint 3 FIND-S3-001..006 (which addressed EARS wrapper, EC-FEED-016/017 structure, PROP tier labels).
